AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST.title: Test
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST2.title: Test 2
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST3.title: Test 3
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST3.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-YOINK.title: Yoink
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOP.title: Boop
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOP.description: #[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to a random enemy.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-STRIKE.title: Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DEFEND.title: Defend
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOUBLE_POKE.title: Double Poke
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOVEL_BONK.title: Shovel Bonk
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOVEL_BONK.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Bury[/gold] {Bury:plural:a|{}} random [gold]Haunted[/gold] {Bury:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], or [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OOPSIES.title: Oopsies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SAFE_KEEPING.title: Safe Keeping
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-AWOO.title: Awoo
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-AWOO.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOGEYMAN.title: Boogeyman
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOGEYMAN.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw !C! card(s).
|}[gold]Haunt[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CURSED_BOOMERANG.title: Cursed Boomerang
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CURSED_BOOMERANG.descript:
#Deal !D! damage !Repeat! times to a random enemy.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.title: Neck Snap
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.selectionScreen: Select a card to add [gold]Retain[/gold] to.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SOULWICK.title: Soulwick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SIPHON_STRIKE.title: Siphon Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAM.title: Slam
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAM.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to ALL enemies.
Apply !WeakPower! [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPIRIT_FIRE.title: Spirit Fire
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TAMP.title: Tamp
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DISCORDANT_DITTY.title: Discordant Ditty
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DUB_THEE_SIR_BONESY.title: Dub Thee Sir Bonesy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FRIGHTEN.title: Frighten
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GET_SILLY.title: Get Silly
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOFY_PUMPKIN.title: Goofy Pumpkin
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOFY_PUMPKIN.description:
#[gold]Haunt[/gold] !Haunt! random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Gain !GoofPower! [gold]Goof[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LIMITLESS_BONES.title: Limitless Bones
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-VANISH.title: Vanish
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-WISPY_EXHUME.title: Wispy Exhume
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOO.title: BOO!
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOO.description:
#Deal !D! damage !Repeat! times.
[gold]Bury[/gold] !Bury! random card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], prioritizing [gold]Haunted[/gold] ones.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PIANO_DROP.title: Piano Drop
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPIT.title: Spit
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPIT.description:
#Deal !D! damage to the enemy (or enemies) with the lowest HP.
If you applied [gold]Doom[/gold] this turn, hits !Repeat! times.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THINK_FAST.title: Think Fast
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR.title: Thumb War
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage !Repeat! times.
Gain !GoofPower! [gold]Goof[/gold].
Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] !ThumbWarPower!.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAINTED_TUNNEL.title: Painted Tunnel
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAINTED_TUNNEL.descriptio:
#Deal !D! damage !Repeat! times to a random enemy.
With each hit, apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ZOMBIE_BUDDY.title: Zombie Buddy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ZOMBIE_BUDDY.description:
#Deal !CD! damage.
Deals !ExtraDamage! additional damage for each card in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ENDLESS_NIGHT.title: Endless Night
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ENDLESS_NIGHT.description: #ALL cards in your Hand gain [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BELOVED_THINGIES.title: Beloved Thingies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BELOVED_THINGIES.descript:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Choose !C! card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COYOTE_TIME.title: Coyote Time
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COYOTE_TIME.description:
#Gain !B! [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw !C! card(s).
Next turn, apply !DoomNextTurnPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ETERNAL_SOULWICK.title: Eternal Soulwick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOUL_TEA_PARTY.title: Foul Tea Party
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOUL_TEA_PARTY.descriptio: ALL enemies gain [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to their [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LATER_PROBLEM.title: Later Problem
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CROWS_GIFT.title: Crow's Gift
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CROWS_GIFT.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Choose 1 of 3 random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [gold]Retain[/gold] and [gold]Haunted[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GIMME_A_HAND.title: Gimme a Hand
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MIMIC_BINDY.title: Mimic Bindy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MIMIC_BINDY.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Choose 1 of 3 random Necrobinder Powers to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-POSSESS_ASCENDER.title: Possess Ascender
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-POSSESS_ASCENDER.descript:
#Choose 1 of 3 random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} Skills from another character to add into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CAVORT.title: Cavort
